meta.author: Aleksandar Spasevski
meta.doc_subtitle: Maps Harlem owned · 9-query homepage split · 3 borough organic hubs · MAT + Dual-Diagnosis service builds · /suburb/ consolidation.

tldr: Elev8's Harlem pin is the only competitor in NYC addiction-treatment that gained ground on every single one of 8 tracked Maps queries over the last 3 months — +787 net cell-positions across the 140-cell grid, zero losses. Organically, Elev8 owns the Harlem-neighborhood queries (rehab harlem pos 1.5, drug rehab harlem pos 1.2, addiction treatment harlem pos 2.1). The lift now comes from three structural moves that compound the won positions: split the homepage (9 commercial NYC queries / 17,100 vol on one URL), build 3 borough organic hubs (1,727 imp/90d bleeding at page 5+), and lock the climbing surfaces (/suburb/upper-east-side pos 24, methadone clinic harlem pos 9.7, MAT/Suboxone blog pos 16–22 at 15,300 vol). Asymmetric play: don't expand surface area, deepen what's already winning.

kpis.label: Grid positions gained (8 queries)
kpis.detail: 140-cell grid Jan 27 → Apr 22 2026, zero losses. Only NYC addiction-treatment pin to gain on all 8 tracked Maps kws in the window.

kpis.label: Maps queries owned (avg rank ≤4)
kpis.detail: dual diagnosis treatment centers nyc 1.98 · inpatient drug rehab nyc 3.42 · inpatient alcohol rehab nyc 3.39. Defend + extract.

kpis.label: Harlem organic ownership
kpis.detail: rehab harlem (252 imp, pos 1.5) · drug rehab harlem (113 imp, pos 1.2) · addiction treatment harlem (33 imp, pos 2.1) · methadone clinic harlem (138 imp, pos 9.7 climbing without a dedicated page).

kpis.label: Homepage commercial overload
kpis.detail: 17,100 combined monthly vol routed through / — single URL cannot rank top-5 for 9 commercial NYC intents AND serve as brand homepage. HP-01..04 splits unlock 9 independent page-1 candidates.

kpis.label: Borough invisibility (Maps-physically-unreachable)
kpis.detail: detox queens 538 pos 48 · outpatient rehab nyc 499 pos 45 · detox brooklyn 267 pos 65 · rehab brooklyn 180 pos 45 · drug rehab brooklyn 105 pos 50 · rehab bronx 103 pos 45 · rehab queens 35 pos 59. 89/89 out-of-grid live SERPs confirm Maps reach capped at ~3–4 mi.

kpis.label: GBP service-area typo (P0)
kpis.detail: Service area lists 'Astoria, OR 97103' — Astoria Oregon, 2,400 mi from Harlem. One-line owner edit. Actively dilutes Maps signal for Queens-Astoria queries.

leads_definition.note: Elev8 has no contact_form_submit event (single form site-wide) and uses non-canonical `phone` event name instead of `click_phone_number`.

trend.headline: GA4 — sessions + form-submit leads by channel, 18 months. GMB clicks and phone-link clicks tracked separately (Jul 2025 onward — GTM tagging for both events was deployed Jul 2025; pre-Jul values not captured).
trend.annotation_text: Leads = form_submit events (GA4 default-channel-grouping). GMB clicks and phone clicks are non-lead intent signals tracked from Jul 2025 onward.
trend.may_extrapolation_note: May 2026 partial — first ~20 days of the month at trailing daily rate.

Apr–May 2026 organic pullback — AIO encroachment on informational blog

levers.name: Homepage split + brand refocus
levers.why: Single URL ranks pos 11–21 for 9 commercial NYC queries totaling 17,100 monthly volume — single URL cannot rank top-5 for 9 different commercial intents AND serve as brand homepage. Splitting unlocks 9 independent page-1 candidates.

actions.name: Build /rehab-centers-nyc (7,600 vol; also parent for borough hubs)
Refocus / on brand + 3-office overview + nav into HP-01..04 + BH-01..03

levers.outcome: Each homepage-split page reaches pos 8–12 within 60–90d. Brand-protected / via refocus.

levers.name: Borough organic hubs + Queens GBP signal fix
levers.why: Single-pin Maps reach is capped at the ~6-mile Harlem grid (89/89 out-of-grid live SERPs confirm). Organic SERP is the only path to Brooklyn/Queens/Bronx capture. 1,727 imp/90d currently bleeding at pos 45+. GBP-01 Astoria-Oregon typo is M1 P0 prereq for Queens hub.

actions.name: P0 Astoria-Oregon → Astoria-NY 11102 typo fix (one-line owner edit)
Mount Eden 301s — consolidate Bronx /suburb/* cannibals into BH-03

levers.outcome: Captures 1,727 imp/90d currently at pos 45+. 3 borough hubs ranking top-30 within 90d.

levers.name: MAT + Dual-Diagnosis service hubs + blog commercial pull-through
levers.why: methadone clinic harlem ranks pos 9.7 with no on-site MAT page. Dual-diagnosis Maps avg #1.98 but organic pos 19.9 — surface unmonetized. Suboxone strips blog ranks pos 16 for 9,900 vol with no commercial pull-through.

actions.name: Add 10 missing services to GBP Services list (MAT / Methadone / Suboxone / Vivitrol / Dual Diagnosis / Outpatient + 4 substance-specific)
Top 8 MAT-adjacent blog → service-page internal links

levers.outcome: Monetize Maps #1.98 dual-diagnosis surface. Capture 15,300 vol MAT-adjacent blog into commercial flow.

levers.name: /suburb/ consolidation + UES depth + GBP audit fixes
levers.why: 64 /suburb/* pages with 5 location-cannibal clusters (Harlem 3 pages, Hamilton Heights, Morningside Heights, Riverside, Mount Eden pairs). /suburb/upper-east-side at pos 24 for 13,200 vol is one push from page 1. GBP photo count 3 vs competitor 50–282.

actions.name: GBP photo brief (Owner Ask: 3 → 30+ photos across 6 categories)
GBP attribute population (8 of 10 'From the Business' sections currently blank)

levers.outcome: /suburb/upper-east-side pos 24 → ≤12 by M3. GBP signal completeness (photos / attributes / description tokens) reaches competitor parity.

levers.name: Off-page micro-targeting + LLM citation audit + content-budget redirect
levers.why: Service-area-priority-matrix-driven rotation. Pause net-new informational doorway production. Redirect ~40% content budget into the 4 service-hub + 3 borough-hub builds. Establish LLM citation baseline.

actions.name: LLM citation baseline audit across 5 surfaces × 8 queries (ChatGPT / Perplexity / Gemini / Copilot / Claude)
3 Driving Direction GBP pins UES — Lenox Hill / Yorkville / Carnegie Hill
3 Driving Direction GBP pins Queens — Astoria / LIC / Forest Hills
3 Driving Direction GBP pins Bronx — Mott Haven / Highbridge / Hunts Point
Reviews topic-density expansion (95 → 130 reviews target, sustained M1–M3 cadence)
Redirect ~40% content budget away from informational doorways → into service-hub + borough-hub builds

levers.outcome: +1 LLM citation surface per query by M3. Maps cells extended into UES + Queens + Bronx via 9 DD pins. Reviews to 130+. Content velocity refocused on commercial.

owner_asks: MAT modality scope — is methadone dispensing on-site at Harlem, or referral-only? Affects MAT hub copy + GBP Services accuracy + OASAS attribute claim.
CARF certification status — flagged pending in GBP context. Confirm for E-E-A-T section of MAT + Dual Diagnosis hubs.
GBP photo upload schedule — Lever D completion gated on this. HQDM delivers photo-category brief; owner commits to 30+ photos across 6 categories within 60 days.

kpi_targets.kpi: Maps grid pooled positions (8 queries × 140 cells × 2 dates)
Tier B commercial-volume capture (% top-10 share on 9 commercial NYC queries)

gsc_organic_trend.headline: Organic peaked Feb–Mar 2026, then a sharp Apr–May pullback (AIO encroachment on the informational blog)
gsc_organic_trend.annotation_text: Source: GSC Search Analytics — daily 365d export aggregated to month. Apr–May pullback is blog-side (informational impressions lost to AI Overview); homepage and service-page impressions remain stable. May 2026 partial (first 14 days).
gsc_organic_trend.may_extrapolation_note: May 2026 partial — first 14 days at trailing pace.

snapshot.eyebrow: HQDM Search Intelligence · Prepared by Aleksandar Spasevski
snapshot.title: Elev8 Centers
snapshot.subtitle: Q2 2026 · NYC · Harlem pin · Client Snapshot
snapshot.footer: Client snapshot · Q2 2026 · Prepared by Aleksandar Spasevski
snapshot.exec_html: Your Harlem pin is the only NYC addiction-treatment provider that gained ground on all eight tracked Maps searches last quarter — +787 grid positions with zero losses — and you own the Harlem-neighborhood searches outright (positions 1–2). The next leg is structural: your homepage is trying to rank for nine different commercial searches at once. Splitting it into dedicated pages, building borough hubs, and adding MAT and dual-diagnosis service hubs unlocks page-one candidates you don't have today.
snapshot.boxes_reading_html: Organic visitors, Maps visibility, and form-submit leads are the clean signals this quarter. GMB clicks and phone-link clicks are tracked separately (Jul 2025 onward) and shown in the strategic dashboard, not bundled into leads here. The current month is partial.

competitors.title: Competitor Movement · Maps
competitors.note_html: You're #1 on Maps across these searches (425 top-3 cells, +105) and gained more than any competitor; Ascendant is the nearest challenger (+88). Lower avg rank is better.
